Subject: Confirmation of Email for QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of the Unigaz Office, conducted by the BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per the Ashghal instruction, it is mandatory for us to commence the work for this project.  

Please confirm your availability to receive the email regarding the audit details and any additional information that may be required.  

Kindly arrange a suitable time for communication.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]
